excursions.subtitle: Discover the treasures of the Paris region with a private chauffeur. Castles, charming villages and historic sites at your fingertips.

itineraries.title: Custom itineraries
itineraries.description: Create your ideal route through the most beautiful sites of Île-de-France.

photos.title: Photo stops
photos.description: Your driver knows the best viewpoints to capture your day.

fullDay.title: Full day
fullDay.description: Enjoy your excursion without worrying about time. Our packages are full-day.

premium.title: Premium experience
premium.description: Water, chargers and Wi-Fi on board. Your comfort is our priority.

rental.subtitle: Exceptional vehicles with chauffeur, available for rental to elevate each of your journeys.

classe-e.subtitle: Business Sedan
classe-e.description: Discreet elegance for your business trips and city outings.

classe-s.subtitle: Luxury Sedan
classe-s.description: The pinnacle of automotive refinement. Cutting-edge technology and absolute comfort.

classe-v.subtitle: Premium Van
classe-v.description: Generous space and perfect modularity for your groups and families.

range-rover.subtitle: Prestige SUV
range-rover.description: British power and prestige. The ultimate luxury SUV for all occasions.

classe-g.subtitle: Iconic SUV
classe-g.description: The timeless Mercedes-Benz icon. Bold character, incomparable style.

rolls-royce.subtitle: Ultra-Luxury
rolls-royce.description: The ultimate in automobiles. Reserved for the most exceptional moments of your life.

lamborghini-urus.subtitle: Super SUV
lamborghini-urus.description: The power and adrenaline of a supercar in an SUV. An extraordinary driving experience.

rr-cullinan.subtitle: Ultra-Luxury SUV
rr-cullinan.description: The ultimate in luxury in SUV format. Unmatched refinement for your most prestigious journeys.

experienceForm.title: Plan your

summary.title: Your summary
summary.emptyDescription: Select an excursion or event in the form to see the service details here.

versailles.title: Palace of Versailles & Gardens
versailles.subtitle: A royal day at the gates of Paris
versailles.description: Discover the world's most famous palace and its French-style gardens. Your chauffeur waits on-site throughout your visit.

chantilly.title: Château de Chantilly
chantilly.subtitle: Art, history and nature north of Paris
chantilly.description: Visit the Chantilly estate, its Condé Museum and majestic stables. A hidden gem of the Île-de-France region.

fontainebleau.title: Château de Fontainebleau
fontainebleau.subtitle: Residence of the Kings of France
fontainebleau.description: Explore eight centuries of history in this UNESCO World Heritage palace, surrounded by a magnificent forest.

chambord.title: Château de Chambord
chambord.subtitle: A Renaissance masterpiece in the Loire Valley
chambord.description: Discover the largest castle in the Loire Valley and its double-helix staircase designed by Leonardo da Vinci.

auvers-sur-oise.title: Auvers-sur-Oise — In the footsteps of Van Gogh
auvers-sur-oise.subtitle: An artistic stroll along the riverbank
auvers-sur-oise.description: Walk in the footsteps of the famous painter: the Church of Auvers, Doctor Gachet's house and the Wheatfield with Crows.

vallee-chevreuse.title: Chevreuse Valley
vallee-chevreuse.subtitle: A nature escape at the gates of Paris
vallee-chevreuse.description: Discover picturesque villages, abbeys and castles in this green valley just 30 km from Paris.

mariage.title: Wedding
mariage.subtitle: Impeccable service for the most beautiful day
mariage.description: Transport for the couple and guests with decorated vehicles on request. Round-trip shuttle service included.

gala.title: Galas & Parties
gala.subtitle: Arrive in style at your events
gala.description: Round-trip transport service for your most prestigious evenings. Punctuality and discretion guaranteed.

entreprise.title: Corporate Events
entreprise.subtitle: Fleet management for your seminars
entreprise.description: Coordinated transport for seminars, team buildings and conferences. Multi-vehicle fleet management on request.

sur-mesure.title: Bespoke Event
sur-mesure.subtitle: Every occasion is unique
sur-mesure.description: Have a specific need? Contact us for a customized quote tailored to your event.

chauffeur.title: Chauffeur Service

bilingual.title: Bilingual Chauffeurs
bilingual.description: Fluent in French & English for a seamless international service.

punctuality.title: Guaranteed Punctuality
punctuality.description: Real-time flight tracking and anticipation of Parisian traffic.

discretion.title: Absolute Discretion
discretion.description: Confidentiality and professionalism for all your journeys.

comfort.title: VIP Comfort
comfort.description: Wi-Fi, international press and refreshments on board.

testimonials.label: They trust us
testimonials.title: What our
testimonials.subtitle: Our clients' trust is our greatest reward.

0.text: Impeccable service, chauffeurs of exceptional courtesy. Highly recommended for your business trips.
0.author: Marie L.

1.text: Perfect punctuality, spotless vehicles. The service I was looking for my VIP clients. A reference in Paris.
1.author: Thomas D.

2.text: Discretion, elegance and professionalism. Exactly what we needed for our corporate events.
2.author: Sophie M.

3.text: The best VTC service in Paris, without hesitation. Every ride is a unique and pleasant travel experience.
3.author: Pierre R.

4.text: Our international guests are always impressed by the quality of service. BLS has become our go-to partner.
4.author: Claire B.

corporate.title: Service
corporate.description: Simplified monthly billing, dedicated chauffeurs and VIP reception for your colleagues and distinguished guests. A bespoke solution for demanding businesses.

corporate.subtitle: A premium transport service tailored to the needs of demanding businesses. Simplified billing, priority service and VIP reception.
corporate.advantagesSubtitle: Benefits designed for professionals and businesses.

billing.title: Simplified Billing
billing.description: A single monthly statement covering all your rides. No upfront costs for your employees, payment at 30 days.

vip.title: VIP Reception
vip.description: Personalised name board on iPad at airports and stations. A professional welcome that elevates your brand image.

priority.title: Priority Booking
priority.description: Guaranteed availability even during peak demand — Fashion Week, trade shows and corporate events.

fleet.title: Events & Fleet Management
fleet.description: Full fleet deployment for your seminars, conventions, Fashion Weeks and corporate events.

trips.title: Our
trips.subtitle: Premium transfers to airports, stations, castles and parks in Île-de-France. Fixed prices, no surprises.

aeroports.label: Airports
aeroports.headline: Airport Transfers
aeroports.editorial: Plan your airport trips with a simple and comfortable solution. All-inclusive packages, meet & greet in the arrivals area with name board and real-time flight tracking. No surprises, just comfort.

gares.label: Stations
gares.headline: Station Shuttles
gares.editorial: Reach Paris's major train stations stress-free. Platform pick-up available, luggage assistance and guaranteed punctuality. A service designed for discerning travellers.

chateaux.label: Castles
chateaux.headline: Castle Excursions
chateaux.editorial: Discover the most beautiful castles of Île-de-France in complete serenity. Your chauffeur accompanies you and waits on site during your visit. A journey through time, in complete elegance.

parcs.label: Parks
parcs.headline: Park Transfers
parcs.editorial: Treat your family or group to a hassle-free transfer to the region's theme parks. Round-trip pick-up, spacious vehicle and attentive chauffeur.

chauffeur.title: Chauffeur
chauffeur.subtitle: A private chauffeur at your service, for as long as you need. The elegance and freedom of bespoke transport.

flexibility.title: Total Flexibility
flexibility.description: Your chauffeur remains at your disposal for the entire desired duration, with no route constraints.

discretion.title: Guaranteed Discretion
discretion.description: Our chauffeurs are trained to the highest standards of confidentiality.

dedicated.title: Dedicated Chauffeur
dedicated.description: A single point of contact for the entire duration of your chauffeur service.

multiStop.title: Multi-stop
multiStop.description: Business meetings, shopping, visits — organise your day as you see fit.

cta.title: Book a
cta.subtitle: Enter your details to receive a personalised quote for your private chauffeur.

transfer.title: Book your
transfer.description: Get an instant estimate and book your vehicle in just a few clicks. CDG and Orly airport packages available.

location.title: Book your
location.description: Vehicle with chauffeur at your disposal for the desired duration. Total freedom, bespoke service.

corporate.title: Request your
corporate.description: A service dedicated to businesses. Complete the form and our sales team will get back to you within 24 hours.

testimonial.text: Impeccable punctuality, spotless vehicle and chauffeur of great courtesy. I recommend without hesitation.
testimonial.author: Philippe D.

home.title: Premium Chauffeur Service Paris & Île-de-France | BLS
home.description: Premium private chauffeur service in Paris and Île-de-France. Airport transfers, hourly hire, events. Book your luxury VTC 24/7 with BLS Limousine Services.

corporate.title: Corporate Transport Solutions Paris | BLS — Premium VTC
corporate.description: Bespoke transport solutions for demanding businesses. Simplified billing, dedicated chauffeurs and VIP reception. Discover the BLS corporate offer today.

trips.title: Airport & Station Transfers Paris | BLS — Premium VTC
trips.description: Premium transfers to CDG, Orly, Paris stations and Île-de-France castles. Fixed prices, personalised meet & greet and real-time flight tracking with BLS.

chauffeur.title: Hourly Chauffeur Hire Paris | BLS — Premium Service
chauffeur.description: Private chauffeur at your disposal in Paris and Île-de-France. Total flexibility, guaranteed discretion, multi-stop journeys. Book your dedicated BLS driver.

events.title: Event & Wedding Transport Paris | BLS — Premium VTC
events.description: Exceptional transport for your galas, weddings and corporate events in Paris. Premium fleet, logistics coordination and bespoke service by BLS Limousine.

destinations.pricingSubtitle: Guaranteed prices with no surprises. Tolls and waiting time included.

cdg.seoTitle: VTC Paris CDG Airport — Private Chauffeur Service | BLS
cdg.seoDescription: Book your private chauffeur to Paris CDG Airport. Personalised meet & greet, real-time flight tracking, fixed price guaranteed. Premium 24/7 service by BLS.
cdg.description: A premium transfer between Paris and Charles de Gaulle Airport. Meet and greet in the arrivals hall with a personalised name board on iPad, real-time flight tracking and guaranteed punctuality. Our chauffeurs know every terminal perfectly for a seamless service.
cdg.ctaDescription: Enter your details for an instant quote for your transfer to Charles de Gaulle Airport.

0.title: Real-time flight tracking
0.description: We automatically adjust the pick-up time in case your flight is delayed or arrives early.

1.title: Arrivals hall meet & greet
1.description: Your chauffeur awaits you with a personalised name board as soon as you exit the terminal.

2.title: Guaranteed fixed price
2.description: All-inclusive flat rate with no surprises. Tolls, waiting time and luggage assistance included.

3.title: Available 24/7
3.description: Service operational at all hours, including for late-night flights and early morning departures.

orly.seoTitle: VTC Paris Orly Airport — Private Chauffeur Service | BLS
orly.seoDescription: Your private chauffeur to Orly Airport from Paris. Door-to-door service, flight tracking, all-inclusive fixed rate. Book your premium VTC with BLS today.
orly.description: Enjoy a comfortable and punctual transfer between Paris and Orly Airport. Our chauffeurs provide a door-to-door service, picking you up at home or hotel and dropping you off directly at your terminal of choice (Orly 1, 2, 3 or 4).
orly.ctaDescription: Enter your details for an instant quote for your transfer to Orly Airport.

0.title: Real-time flight tracking
0.description: Automatic pick-up time adjustment based on your flight status.

1.title: All terminals served
1.description: Orly 1, 2, 3 and 4 — your chauffeur drops you off or meets you as close as possible to your gate.

2.title: All-inclusive flat rate
2.description: Guaranteed fixed price including tolls, parking, waiting time and luggage assistance.

3.title: Home pick-up
3.description: Your chauffeur picks you up from the address of your choice, anywhere in Paris and Île-de-France.

disneyland.seoTitle: VTC Disneyland Paris — Premium Family Transfer | BLS
disneyland.seoDescription: Premium VTC transfer to Disneyland Paris from Paris or airports. Spacious vehicles, child seats, fixed price. Book your BLS chauffeur for a magical start.
disneyland.description: Treat your family to a comfortable, stress-free transfer to Disneyland Paris. Our spacious vehicles welcome guests of all ages, with child seats available on request and generous space for pushchairs and luggage.
disneyland.ctaDescription: Enter your details for an instant quote for your transfer to Disneyland Paris.

0.title: Spacious vehicles
0.description: Mercedes V-Class and premium sedans to comfortably transport the whole family and your luggage.

1.title: Child seats available
1.description: Baby seats and booster seats provided free of charge on request when booking.

2.title: Direct airport transfers
2.description: Direct service from CDG, Orly or your Paris hotel. Perfect for tourists from arrival.

3.title: Family fixed price
3.description: No-surprise flat rate, more affordable than a taxi for groups and families.
